title: Russian Oat Pudding
description: A traditional Russian dessert made with oats, sour milk, and a touch of sweetness.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring sour milk to a simmer over medium heat.
Add sugar, cinnamon, vanilla extract, and salt to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Gradually add oats to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring constantly, until oats have absorbed most of the liquid.
Remove saucepan from heat and stir in butter until melted.
Transfer pudding to individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is lightly golden brown.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
